Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
Impact of Transition from 27 to 30 CCW Chronic Conditions │ March 2022 │ V 1.0 1 

1.0 Overview 

The Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services (CMS) created the 27 predefined Chronic Conditions Warehouse (CCW) 
common and chronic condition categories,1 in collaboration with the Research Data Assistance Center (ResDAC) and 
the CCW team.2 In 2020, CMS contracted an expert panel to validate the algorithms following the change from
